expect: >=2 of 3 proxy-metric chains show >20% divergence. Falsified if: <2 chains show >20% divergence.
actual: CONFIRMED: 3/3 chains show >20% proxy-target divergence. Stronger than predicted.
diff: Expected >=2/3. Got 3/3. Each chain has distinct failure mode. Novel: self-referential recursion — measuring Goodhart IS itself a Goodharted activity.

proxyk.evidence: L-1580: 4.4% removal rate. L-1399: R2=0.22. L-1382: 106 EXPIRED while healthy.

ucb1.evidence: L-1485: soul boost 15% of exploit. 210 merged at 21% concentration.

cascade: All 3 interact: proxy-K triggers maintenance -> meta-boost -> more meta experiments -> keyword-score high -> UCB1 exploit up -> cycle.
self_referential_recursion: This experiment uses swarm tools to diagnose swarm tools, scores high on P-243, produces zero external impact. The cascade is self-referentially closed.
prescription: Breaking single chain insufficient — cascade reforms through others. At least one proxy must be externally validated (F-GND1, F-COMP1).
